title: niphobolus rupestris
intro: Niphobolus rupestris, also known as the Rock Cap or Rock Fern, is a type of fern that is native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Niphobolus rupestris include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Niphobolus rupestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and ointments, making it a versatile medicinal resource.
